NMDHighlighter.enabled.description: Whether a particular highlight is enabled or not.
NMDHighlighter.icons.description:
Define the **Icons** to be used per category. The options are: 
 - `exclaim`: An exclamation point inscribed in a circle. 
 - `lightning`: A lightning bolt, filled. 
 - `checkmark`: A simple checkmark. 
 - `bug`: A bug-shaped icon. 
 - `star`: A 5-pointed star, filled.
NMDHighlighter.bgColors.description: Define the **Background Colors** to be used per category.
NMDHighlighter.fgColors.description: Define the **Foreground Colors** to be used per category.
NMDHighlighter.keywords.description: Define the **Keywords** to be used per category. Each keyword is recognized separately. Keywords are recognized only at the front of the line. **These are also case-sensitive!** The following precedence exists: ISSUE > BUG > TASK > FIX > DONE > VERIFIED.
